title: Cloud Kickoff Assembly: Discovering Cloud, Tech for Students & Communities
description: Cloud Kickoff Assembly: Discovering Cloud, Tech for Students & Communities is an online academic assembly organized by AWS Learning Club – Alpha that introduces students to cloud computing and its role in today’s technology-driven world. Participants can expect a guided introduction to cloud fundamentals, a live demonstration of Amazon Web Services (AWS) in action, and practical discussions on how cloud skills translate into real career opportunities. The event also features interactive activities, an open forum with industry insights, and a student community pitch highlighting opportunities to get involved in cloud learning initiatives. By the end of the assembly, participants will gain a clearer understanding of cloud technology, industry pathways, and how they can begin their journey in the tech and cloud ecosystem.
